news.title: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
news.summary: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.

news.title: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
news.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley says the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues. Farley said the issues have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.

news.title: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
news.summary: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans. It comes on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.

news.title: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
news.summary: Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday. Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, LockheedMartin and Oracle — are sponsoring the effort.

news.title: As ACA enrollment falls by millions, Trump administration and policy gurus disagree on why
news.summary: The Affordable Care Act marketplace enrollment has declined by 3 million people. The Trump administration points to fraud controls. Policy experts point to cost. The Obama administration pointed to cost controls.

news.title: A looming AI disappointment and rising yields. Why one research firm is hitting the brakes on U.S. stocks.
news.summary: MacroResearchBoard warns of big test for investors in the next 12 months. In a market dominated by tech stocks, a big test is facing investors.

news.title: ‘We were stunned’: My daughter, 39, said her mother-in-law gives her more money than we do. Do I call her out?
news.summary: She thanked us for the $100 birthday gift and then announced that her mother-in-law had sent her $400. “She said, ‘I’m so glad you sent me that,’” she said.

news.title: U.S. stocks have delivered 8.7% a year since independence was declared in 1776
news.summary: . What 250 years of independence have meant for America’s investors. What has the U.S. economy done in the last 250 years?

news.title: ‘She wants him gone’: My friend took in a homeless man as a caretaker. After 10 years, how can she evict him?
news.summary: “He lived rent-free, helping her with health-related issues and other tasks,” her daughter says. “He’s been a great help to us.”

news.title: ‘I claimed Social Security at 62’: At 76, I’m working at Walmart. Why do I still owe payroll taxes?
news.summary: “It seems like half of the workforce at our local Walmart is over 65,” she says. “It’s a little bit of a shock.” “I’m like, ‘Oh my God,’ she adds.
